requirement_topic.en: IEC 61851 Safety Baseline and CGES Conformity Evidence
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 61851 安全基线及 CGES 合格评定证据
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 61851 安全基線及 CGES 合格評定證據

summary.en: For EV charging equipment in Montenegro, exporters should prepare IEC-family evidence suitable for regulatory review at the project and utility level. IEC 61851-1 provides baseline requirements for conductive charging, and IEC 61851-23 covers DC EV supply equipment. Site documentation should also include enclosure protection, installation instructions, markings, and environment-assurance evidence.
summary.zh: 黑山电动汽车充电设备应基于 IEC 体系准备适用于项目和电网级审查的证据。IEC 61851-1 是传导式供电的基线要求，IEC 61851-23 覆盖直流供能设备。项目文件还应包括外壳防护、安装说明、标识和适用于目标环境条件的证据。
summary.zht: 黑山電動汽車充電設備應基於 IEC 體系準備適用於項目和電網級審查的證據。IEC 61851-1 是傳導式供電基線要求，IEC 61851-23 則涵蓋直流供能設備。項目文件還應包括外殼防護、安裝說明、標識和適用於目標環境條件的證據。

standards_or_laws: IEC 61851-1 — safety of conductive EV supply equipment

summary.en: China comparable safety baseline is GB/T 18487.1-2023, used with GB/T connector and communication standards. It can support engineering comparison, but China evidence is not equivalent to Montenegro IEC 61851 evidence for ISME/REGAGEN/CGES or project-owner review.
summary.zh: 中国可比的安全基线是 GB/T 18487.1-2023，并配合 GB/T 接口和通信标准使用，可用于工程比较，但不等同于黑山 ISME/REGAGEN/CGES 或项目业主审查所需的 IEC 61851 证据。
summary.zht: 中國可比安全基線為 GB/T 18487.1-2023，並配合 GB/T 介面與通訊標準使用，可用於工程比較，但不等於黑山 ISME/REGAGEN/CGES 或項目業主審查所需的 IEC 61851 證據。

gap.en: Exporters should prepare IEC 61851 evidence for the exact model, including protective-device ratings, earthing, isolation, emergency-stop and safe-disconnection descriptions, enclosure IP evidence, English documentation, and explicit mapping from Chinese evidence to IEC clauses.
gap.zh: 出口商应为具体型号准备 IEC 61851 证据，包括保护器件额定值、接地、绝缘、急停和安全断开说明、外壳 IP 证据、英文文件，并将中国证据与 IEC 条款进行显式映射。
gap.zht: 出口商應為具體型號準備 IEC 61851 證據，包括保護器件額定值、接地、絕緣、急停和安全斷開說明、外殼 IP 證據、英文文件，並將中國證據與 IEC 條款進行明確映射。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where CGES and project owner confirm ISME- or IEC-based safety evidence is required for the grid-connected model and use case
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 18487 applies to Chinese design and is not direct IEC 61851 evidence for Montenegro without additional assessment

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Build Montenegro EV charger files around IEC 61851 evidence and project-specific regulatory review, using China GB/T documents only as mapped references. Verify site acceptance criteria before claiming readiness.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应围绕 IEC 61851 证据和项目特定监管审查构建黑山充电桩文件，中国GB/T 文件仅作为映射参考。提交前应核实现场验收标准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應圍繞 IEC 61851 證據和項目特定監管審查構建黑山充電樁文件，中國GB/T 文件僅作為映射參考。提交前應核實現場驗收標準。
